query:
SELECT 
  wc.remoteJid,
  wc.lastFromMe,
  wc.lastStatus AS wcLastStatus,
  wc.lastMessageAt,
  LEFT(wc.lastMessagePreview, 40) AS preview,
  (SELECT m.status FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS actualLastMsgStatus,
  (SELECT m.fromMe FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS actualLastFromMe
FROM wa_conversations wc
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1
ORDER BY wc.lastMessageAt DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT 
  wc.remoteJid,
  wc.lastFromMe,
  wc.lastStatus AS wcLastStatus,
  wc.lastMessageAt,
  LEFT(wc.lastMessagePreview, 40) AS preview,
  (SELECT m.status FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS actualLastMsgStatus,
  (SELECT m.fromMe FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS actualLastFromMe
FROM wa_conversations wc
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1
ORDER BY wc.lastMessageAt DESC
LIMIT 15
